item.description: <!DOCTYPE html> A Little Bit About Me! <!DOCTYPE html> Greetings! I’m a Data Science & AI Engineer at Generated Health Limited with a master’s in business analytics from Imperial College Business School and a BTech in Civil Engineering from IIT Madras. I have a knack for stats, programming, and big data, and I’m seasoned in data engineering, machine learning, and AI. Complex challenges are my playground, and I love finding innovative solutions.
<!DOCTYPE html> ML AI and LLM Statistics AWS Cloud Regex Others
